description: Legal document. In the hand of Mevorakh b. Natan. Location: Cairo. Dated: Last decade of Adar 1481 Seleucid, which is March 1170 CE, under the authority of the Gaʾon Sar Shalom b. Moshe ha-Levi. (This is the first known document invoking his authority during his first term in office, 1170–71 CE.) Concerning the installments of payments of the delayed wedding gift from Surūr b. Ghālib al-Dajājī to his divorcee Sitt al-Jamīʿ bt. Shemarya. Receipts of payments are recorded on verso. Signed by Shelomo b. Shemuel ha-Levi and Yehoshuaʿ b. Aharon. (Information from CUDL and Goitein's index card.)
